input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.2.4
            TITLE: electrical equipment (ev only)

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.2.4: Electrical Equipment (EV Only)
VE.2.4 Electrical Equipment (EV Only)  
The following items must accompany the vehicle at all times: 
• Two pairs of High Voltage insulating gloves 
• A multimeter
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 76 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: rule VE.2.4: Electrical Equipment (EV Only) VE.2.4 Electrical Equipment (EV Only) The following items must accompany the vehicle at all times: • Two pairs of High Voltage insulating gloves • A multimeter
